# Stars! Web — Copilot Context

This file is auto-loaded by VS Code Copilot on every session.
See `docs/llm/onboarding.md` for full project context, tools, and issue tracker.

## Quick Reference

- **Repo:** jakez-gh/stars-web (public, GitHub)
- **Branch model:** feature branches → master
- **Tests:** `python -m pytest tests/ --tb=short` (run from `stars_web/`, with `$env:PYTHONPATH = "src"`)
- **Dev server:** `start.bat` or `$env:PYTHONPATH = "src"; python -m stars_web.run`
- **GitHub CLI:** `gh` is authenticated as jakez-gh. Use `gh issue list` to see open tasks.
- **Project board:** <https://github.com/users/jakez-gh/projects/1>
- **Dependency graph:** `docs/DEPENDENCIES.md` (Mermaid diagram — renders on GitHub)
- **Issues & milestones:** All project planning lives in GitHub Issues. Check there first.
- **LLM artifacts:** Store in `docs/llm/`, not in the prompts folder.
- **Core rules:** `C:\Users\jake\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\prompts\core-rules.instructions.md`
